subject: Gundren's rescue
fact: Multiple NPCs warned that Gundren's captors will eventually stop trying to extract information from him and may kill him.
source_quote: Multiple NPCs warned that Gundren's captors will eventually stop trying to extract information from him and may kill him

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon lacks darkvision.
source_quote: Zenvon (halfling) lacks darkvision

subject: light source consequence
fact: Using a light source will eliminate stealth.
source_quote: using a light source will eliminate stealth

subject: Sister Maela
fact: The party must coordinate with Sister Maela for navigation in dark areas.
source_quote: The party must coordinate around Sister Maela and Veyra for navigation in dark areas

subject: Veyra
fact: The party must coordinate with Veyra for navigation in dark areas.
source_quote: The party must coordinate around Sister Maela and Veyra for navigation in dark areas

subject: giant poisonous snake
fact: A giant snake was discovered blocking a passage inside the cave.
source_quote: A giant snake was discovered blocking a passage inside the cave

subject: snake encounter status
fact: The party has not yet engaged the giant snake.
source_quote: the party has not yet engaged it

subject: wolves
fact: Three wolves were spotted chained inside the cave.
source_quote: Three wolves were spotted chained inside the cave

subject: Red Brands
fact: The Red Brands gang continues to operate freely in Phandalin.
source_quote: The Red Brands gang continues to operate freely in Phandalin

subject: Tresendar Manor
fact: Tresendar Manor serves as the Red Brands' safehouse.
source_quote: with their safehouse at Tresendar Manor

subject: Glasstaff
fact: Glasstaff is the leader of the Red Brands.
source_quote: their leader Glasstaff

subject: Glasstaff confrontation
fact: Glasstaff has not yet been confronted.
source_quote: Glasstaff not yet confronted

subject: Sister Garaele
fact: Sister Garaele returned to town wounded.
source_quote: Sister Garaele returned to town wounded

subject: Sister Garaele
fact: Sister Garaele is not speaking about what happened to her.
source_quote: not speaking about what happened

subject: Halia
fact: Halia works at the Phandalin Miners Exchange.
source_quote: Halia at the Phandalin Miners Exchange

subject: Halia visit
fact: Halia has not been visited yet.
source_quote: has not been visited

subject: Halia's connection
fact: Halia's relationship with the Red Brands is unclear.
source_quote: her relationship with the Red Brands is unclear

subject: black stone obelisk fragments
fact: The threat of someone assembling the black stone obelisk fragments remains an unresolved background danger.
source_quote: The threat of someone assembling the black stone obelisk fragments remains an unresolved background danger

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy is playing the character Zenvon.
source_quote: Nikhil Reddy (as Zenvon)

subject: snake retreat
fact: The party retreated from the giant snake.
source_quote: after retreating from the giant snake

subject: Gundren rescue objective
fact: Rescuing Gundren from the goblin cave is the primary objective.
source_quote: Rescue Gundren from the goblin cave as the primary objective

subject: Halia investigation
fact: Investigating Halia's connection to the Red Brands is deferred until after the rescue.
source_quote: deferred until after the rescue

subject: Sister Garaele inquiry
fact: Speaking with Sister Garaele through Sister Maela is deferred until after the rescue.
source_quote: deferred until after the rescue

subject: hidden tunnel
fact: Carp Alderleaf discovered a hidden tunnel.
source_quote: hidden tunnel discovered by Carp Alderleaf

subject: Shrine of Luck
fact: The party is to return to the Shrine of Luck acolyte after rescuing Gundren to receive the next quest.
source_quote: Return to the Shrine of Luck acolyte after rescuing Gundren to receive the next quest

subject: Old Owl Well
fact: Old Owl Well has an undead threat.
source_quote: Old Owl Well and the undead threat

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath offers boots of striding and springing for investigating Old Owl Well.
source_quote: earn the boots of striding and springing from Daran Edermath

subject: Red Brands confrontation
fact: Confronting the Red Brands at Tresendar Manor and dealing with Glasstaff is a future task.
source_quote: Confront the Red Brands at Tresendar Manor and deal with their leader Glasstaff
